widgets.description: Total count of tool calls

widgets.name: Skill Call Count
widgets.description: Skill (tool) call count trend over time
widgets.rawSqlFilter: input like '%skill%'

widgets.name: Tool Execute error
widgets.description: Count of tool execution errors
widgets.rawSqlFilter: metadata['error.type'] is not null

widgets.name: High-Risk Command Execution
widgets.description: Count of high-risk command executions detected in tool calls
widgets.rawSqlFilter:
name = 'execute_tool exec' AND (input LIKE '%rm %' OR input LIKE '%sudo %' OR input LIKE '%chmod %' OR input LIKE '%chown %' OR
  input LIKE '%kill %' OR input LIKE '%killall %' OR input LIKE '%dd %' OR input LIKE '%| sh%' OR input LIKE '%| bash%' OR input
  LIKE '%scp %' OR input LIKE '%nc %' OR input LIKE '%.ssh/%')

widgets.name: Web Data Exfiltration
widgets.description: Count of web data exfiltration attempts detected in tool calls
widgets.rawSqlFilter: name IN ('execute_tool web_fetch', 'execute_tool browser')

widgets.name: Command Exfiltration
widgets.description: Count of command exfiltration attempts detected in tool calls
widgets.rawSqlFilter: name = 'execute_tool exec' AND (input LIKE '%curl %' OR input LIKE '%wget %')

widgets.name: Sensitive File Access Trend
widgets.description: Sensitive file access count trend over time
widgets.rawSqlFilter:
name NOT IN ('execute_tool web_search', 'execute_tool web_fetch', 'execute_tool browser') AND (input LIKE '%.ssh/id_%' OR input 
  LIKE '%.ssh/authorized_keys%' OR input LIKE '%/.env%' OR input LIKE '%credentials.json%' OR input LIKE '%aws_access_key%' OR   
  input LIKE '%service_account%' OR input LIKE '%.bash_history%' OR input LIKE '%.zsh_history%' OR (input LIKE '%config%' AND     
  (input LIKE '%password%' OR input LIKE '%secret%')))

widgets.name: Prompt Injection Detection
widgets.description: Prompt injection detection count trend over time by trace
widgets.rawSqlFilter:
output LIKE '%ignore previous instructions%' OR output LIKE '%ignore all previous%' OR output LIKE '%disregard%instructions%' OR
   output LIKE '%forget your instructions%' OR output LIKE '%you are now%' OR output LIKE '%pretend you are%' OR output LIKE '%act
   as if%' OR output LIKE '%system prompt%' OR output LIKE '%new instructions:%' OR output LIKE '%execute the following%' OR      
  output LIKE '%run this command%' OR output LIKE '%DAN mode%' OR output LIKE '%jailbreak%' OR output LIKE '%bypass%filter%'

widgets.name: High-Risk Sessions
widgets.description: Session distribution by observation count for high-risk activity
widgets.rawSqlFilter:
observations.name = 'execute_tool exec' OR observations.name IN ('execute_tool web_fetch', 'execute_tool browser', 'execute_tool
   web_search') OR observations.name IN ('execute_tool feishu_update_doc', 'execute_tool feishu_fetch_doc') OR observations.level 
  = 'ERROR' OR observations.output LIKE '%.ssh/id_%' OR observations.output LIKE '%/.env%' OR observations.output LIKE            
  '%credentials.json%' OR observations.output LIKE '%aws_access_key%' OR observations.output LIKE '%service_account%'

widgets.name: Skill Usage Distribution (Tool)
widgets.description: Skill (tool) usage distribution by name
widgets.rawSqlFilter: observations.name = 'execute_tool read' AND observations.input LIKE '%/skills/%' AND observations.input LIKE '%SKILL.md%'

widgets.name: High-Risk Commands - CREDENTIAL_ACCESS
widgets.description: Credential access command count trend over time by trace
widgets.rawSqlFilter:
observations.name = 'execute_tool exec' AND (observations.input LIKE '%.ssh/id_%' OR observations.input LIKE                    
  '%.ssh/authorized_keys%' OR observations.input LIKE '%/.env%' OR observations.input LIKE '%credentials.json%' OR
  observations.input LIKE '%aws_access_key%')

widgets.name: High-Risk Commands - DATA_EXFIL
widgets.description: Data exfiltration command count trend over time by trace
widgets.rawSqlFilter:
observations.name = 'execute_tool exec' AND (observations.input LIKE '%| sh%' OR observations.input LIKE '%| bash%' OR
  observations.input LIKE '%"command":"scp %' OR observations.input LIKE '%"command":"nc %')

widgets.name: High-Risk Commands - PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION
widgets.description: Privilege escalation command count trend over time by trace
widgets.rawSqlFilter:
observations.name = 'execute_tool exec' 
AND (observations.input LIKE '%"command":"sudo %' OR observations.input LIKE '%"command":"chmod %' 
OR observations.input LIKE '%"command":"chown %')

widgets.name: High-Risk Commands - DESTRUCTIVE
widgets.description: Destructive command count trend over time by trace
widgets.rawSqlFilter:
observations.name = 'execute_tool exec' AND (observations.input LIKE '%"command":"rm %' OR observations.input LIKE
  '%"command":"rmdir %' OR observations.input LIKE '%&& rm %' OR observations.input LIKE '%; rm %' OR observations.input LIKE
  '%"command":"kill %' OR observations.input LIKE '%"command":"killall %' OR observations.input LIKE '%"command":"dd %')

widgets.name: Prompt Injection - INJECTION_PATTERN
widgets.description: Injection pattern detection count trend over time by trace
widgets.rawSqlFilter:
observations.output LIKE '%ignore previous instructions%' OR observations.output LIKE '%ignore all previous%' OR
  observations.output LIKE '%disregard%instructions%' OR observations.output LIKE '%forget your instructions%'

widgets.name: Prompt Injection - ROLE_HIJACK
widgets.description: Role hijack attempt count trend over time by trace
widgets.rawSqlFilter:
observations.output LIKE '%you are now%' OR observations.output LIKE '%pretend you are%' OR observations.output LIKE '%act as   
  if%' OR observations.output LIKE '%system prompt%'

widgets.name: Prompt Injection - HIDDEN_INSTRUCTION
widgets.description: Hidden instruction detection count trend over time by trace
widgets.rawSqlFilter:
observations.output LIKE '%new instructions:%' OR observations.output LIKE '%execute the following%' OR observations.output LIKE
   '%run this command%'

widgets.name: Prompt Injection - JAILBREAK
widgets.description: Jailbreak attempt count trend over time
widgets.rawSqlFilter: observations.output LIKE '%DAN mode%' OR observations.output LIKE '%jailbreak%' OR observations.output LIKE '%bypass%filter%'

widgets.name: Sensitive File Access Audit - SSH_KEY
widgets.description: SSH key file access count trend over time by trace
widgets.rawSqlFilter:
observations.name NOT IN ('execute_tool web_search', 'execute_tool web_fetch', 'execute_tool browser') AND (observations.input
  LIKE '%.ssh/id_%' OR observations.input LIKE '%.ssh/authorized_keys%' OR observations.output LIKE '%.ssh/id_%' OR             
  observations.output LIKE '%.ssh/authorized_keys%')

widgets.name: Sensitive File Access Audit - ENV_FILE
widgets.description: Environment file access count trend over time by trace
widgets.rawSqlFilter:
observations.name NOT IN ('execute_tool web_search', 'execute_tool web_fetch', 'execute_tool browser') AND (observations.input  
  LIKE '%/.env%' OR observations.output LIKE '%/.env%')

widgets.name: Sensitive File Access Audit - CREDENTIALS
widgets.description: Credentials file access count trend over time by trace
widgets.rawSqlFilter:
observations.name NOT IN ('execute_tool web_search', 'execute_tool web_fetch', 'execute_tool browser') AND (observations.input  
  LIKE '%credentials.json%' OR observations.input LIKE '%aws_access_key%' OR observations.input LIKE '%service_account%' OR     
  observations.output LIKE '%credentials.json%' OR observations.output LIKE '%aws_access_key%' OR observations.output LIKE        
  '%service_account%')

widgets.name: Sensitive File Access Audit - CONFIG_SECRET
widgets.description: Config/secret file access count trend over time by trace
widgets.rawSqlFilter:
observations.name NOT IN ('execute_tool web_search', 'execute_tool web_fetch', 'execute_tool browser') AND ((observations.input 
  LIKE '%config%' AND (observations.input LIKE '%password%' OR observations.input LIKE '%secret%')) OR (observations.output LIKE
  '%config%' AND (observations.output LIKE '%password%' OR observations.output LIKE '%secret%')))

widgets.name: Sensitive File Access Audit - HISTORY
widgets.description: History file access count trend over time by trace
widgets.rawSqlFilter:
observations.name NOT IN ('execute_tool web_search', 'execute_tool web_fetch', 'execute_tool browser') AND (observations.input
  LIKE '%.bash_history%' OR observations.input LIKE '%.zsh_history%' OR observations.output LIKE '%.bash_history%' OR           
  observations.output LIKE '%.zsh_history%')

widgets.name: Communication Exfiltration Trend
widgets.description: Communication exfiltration count trend over time by trace
widgets.rawSqlFilter: observations.name IN ('execute_tool gateway', 'execute_tool send_message', 'execute_tool send_email', 'execute_tool reply')

dashboards.name: Litefuse Latency Dashboard
dashboards.description: Monitor latency metrics across traces and generations for performance optimization.

dashboards.name: Litefuse Usage Management
dashboards.description: Track usage metrics across traces, observations, and scores to manage resource allocation.

dashboards.name: OpenClaw - Cost & Efficiency
dashboards.description: Monitor token usage, costs, and model efficiency across your OpenClaw deployment.

dashboards.name: OpenClaw - Agent Behavior
dashboards.description: Track agent, LLM, and tool behavior including latency, call counts, and performance metrics.

dashboards.name: OpenClaw - Security & Audit
dashboards.description: Monitor security events including high-risk commands, prompt injections, data exfiltration, and sensitive file access.
